bio.en: Book lover, knowledge seeker, and tech enthusiast. I believe technology is the art of problem-solving. I run to balance the stresses of life and to sharpen my endurance.
bio.vi: Người yêu sách, kẻ tìm kiếm tri thức, và người đam mê công nghệ. Tôi tin rằng công nghệ là nghệ thuật giải quyết vấn đề. Tôi chạy bộ để cân bằng căng thẳng cuộc sống và rèn luyện sức bền.

philosophy.en: Technology is the art of problem-solving. Simplicity scales. Complex systems fail at their seams.
philosophy.vi: Công nghệ là nghệ thuật giải quyết vấn đề. Sự đơn giản có khả năng mở rộng. Hệ thống phức tạp thất bại ở các điểm nối.

education.institution: VNU University of Engineering and Technology

timeline.title: Technical Leader — YODY
timeline.desc: Leading technical decisions and architecture for AI-driven retail systems. Driving omnichannel enablement and platform modernization.

timeline.title: Software Developer — YODY
timeline.desc: Built and maintained core e-commerce infrastructure serving 1M+ users. Implemented microservices architecture with Go and Node.js.

timeline.title: Software Engineer — ScaleUP
timeline.desc: Developed CRM and operational tools for startup ecosystem. Delivered full-stack solutions with React and PostgreSQL.

timeline.title: Software Engineer — Hoang Phuc International
timeline.desc: Engineered e-commerce platform processing 3000+ orders daily. Optimized database queries reducing latency by 40%.

timeline.title: Frontend Developer — Hoang Phuc International
timeline.desc: Built responsive UI components and checkout flows. Improved mobile conversion rate by 15%.

timeline.title: Software Engineer — GREENFEED GROUP
timeline.desc: Developed B2B e-commerce and internal CMS. Led migration from monolith to service-oriented architecture.

timeline.title: Frontend Developer — GREENFEED GROUP
timeline.desc: Implemented dashboard UI and data visualization components. Reduced bundle size by 30% through code splitting.

timeline.title: Frontend Developer — HD Tower (Sun Group)
timeline.desc: Built corporate website and internal webapp with Vue.js. Ensured cross-browser compatibility and accessibility.

timeline.title: Frontend Developer — Vinmart
timeline.desc: Developed inventory management UI and reporting dashboards. Collaborated with backend team on REST API design.

timeline.title: Frontend Developer — Vietinbank
timeline.desc: Built internal banking tools and smart branch interfaces. Focused on security best practices and form validation.
